    Here is the list of confirmed speakers in alleatory order headed by this year’s award winners

    The ISQBP President is grateful to everyone who accepted the invitation to contribute

    Modesto Orozco
    Zoe Cournia
    William Jorgensen
    Viorel Buchete
    Ulf Ryde
    Tom Cheatham
    Ruibin Liang

    Paolo Carloni
    Nigel Richards
    Nicoleta Bondar
    Nathalie Reuter
    Martin Zacharias
    Marco de Vivo
    Maciej Szaleniec
    Laurentiu Spiridon
    Klaus Liedl
    Johan Åqvist
    Joanna Trylska
    Jiří Šponer

    Jan Huertas
